home.hero_subline: Precision gear matches, elite tactical analytics, and the deep-dive tennis insights the modern player needs to play their best.
home.features_heading: Built for tennis lovers, by tennis lovers
home.features_sub: The tools that make the difference.
home.f1_desc: Why matches were decided the way they were. The turning points, patterns, and stats that tell the real story.
home.f2_desc: Who wins and why. H2H data, form analysis, and surface records — before the first ball is hit.
home.f3_desc: 7 questions. 30 seconds. A personalized racket recommendation matched to your game, level, and budget.
home.f4_desc: Find the perfect string and tension for your racket and playing style. Coming soon.
home.cta_heading: Ready to find your perfect racket?
home.cta_desc: Take our 7-question quiz and get a personalized recommendation in under a minute.

footer.tagline: Data-driven tennis intelligence. Match analysis, predictions, and gear recommendations.
footer.community_text: Join the TennisMind Telegram for daily tennis insights.
footer.built_for: Built for tennis lovers, by tennis lovers.

analysis.title: Match Analyses
analysis.subtitle: In-depth tactical breakdowns of professional matches. Understand the patterns that define big points and great careers.

predictions.title: Tournament Predictions
predictions.subtitle: Data-backed win probability forecasts for major ATP and WTA tournaments. Updated after every significant result.
predictions.disclaimer: Probabilities are model-generated estimates based on recent form, head-to-head records, and surface statistics. Not financial or betting advice.

racket_finder.title: Racket Finder
racket_finder.subtitle: Answer 7 quick questions and get a personalized recommendation.
racket_finder.loading_desc: Analysing your profile against our full racket database.
racket_finder.result_subtitle: Based on your 7 answers, here's our top pick for you.
racket_finder.runner_up_desc: A strong alternative that also fits your playing profile. Reset the quiz and select this racket's brand if you'd like a dedicated breakdown.
racket_finder.setup_desc: Every racket performs best with the right string. Get a personalized string recommendation matched to your new racket.
racket_finder.q_skill: What is your current playing level?
racket_finder.q_weight: Do you prefer a certain racket weight?
racket_finder.q_style: How would you describe your game style?
racket_finder.q_priority: What matters most to you in a racket?
racket_finder.q_brand: Do you have any brand preference?
racket_finder.rec_string_personalized: Want a more personalized string recommendation?

buy.title: Shop coming soon!
buy.desc: We're setting up our shop. In the meantime, you can find your racket at Tennis Point, Tennis Warehouse Europe, or Amazon.

string_finder.title: String Finder
string_finder.subtitle: Answer 5 quick questions and get a personalized string recommendation.
string_finder.coming_soon_desc: We're building our string database right now. Your profile has been captured — check back soon or follow us on Telegram for updates.
string_finder.q_string: What string are you currently using?
string_finder.q_tension: What tension do you currently use?
string_finder.q_breaking: How often do you break strings?
string_finder.q_missing: What's missing in your current setup?

api_error.title: High demand right now
api_error.desc: We're experiencing high demand right now. Please try again in a few minutes, or reach out to us on Telegram for a personal recommendation.
